contents:
找到了一个官方回复：OOD
Hi thank you for concern - actually there are plenty of ways keeping birds away. Artificial eagles on the roof, sound solutions, lights, stickers et cetera... We are working together with company which is specialized for this topic. As we have only 36sq. of glass in our ÖÖD hotel room then it is much easier to find solutions - compared with skyscrapers...Today we have used artificial eagles and so far so good - there have not been any dead birds.
